features.name: Project scaffold + HTTPS certs
features.nameZh: 项目脚手架 + HTTPS 证书
features.description: Initialize Node.js/TypeScript project structure, install dependencies (ws, express), generate dev SSL certs, set up tsconfig and basic dev scripts
features.descriptionZh: 初始化项目结构，安装依赖，生成自签名 HTTPS 证书，配置 TypeScript 和开发脚本
features.evidence: init.sh passes (install, typecheck, build). Server starts, generates self-signed certs, serves HTTPS on :3000. 2026-05-13

features.name: WebSocket server + phone client
features.nameZh: WebSocket 服务端 + 手机客户端
features.description: HTTPS server serving phone UI page, WebSocket server accepting connections. Phone page: getUserMedia → MediaRecorder (opus, 20ms slices) → ws.send binary chunks. Verify chunks arrive server-side.
features.descriptionZh: 手机页面采集麦克风 → MediaRecorder 编码 → WebSocket 发送 opus 数据块到服务端

features.name: Server audio decode → virtual mic
features.nameZh: 服务端音频解码 → 虚拟麦克风
features.description: Pipe incoming opus chunks through FFmpeg (decode to PCM), write to virtual audio device (BlackHole on macOS, VB-Cable on Windows). End-to-end audio flow working.
features.descriptionZh: Opus 数据通过 FFmpeg 解码为 PCM，写入虚拟声卡（BlackHole/VB-Cable），实现端到端音频通路

features.name: Connection UX + error handling
features.nameZh: 连接体验 + 错误处理
features.description: QR code on PC page for phone to scan, connection status display, auto-reconnect on WebSocket disconnect, mic permission error handling, start/stop controls on phone UI
features.descriptionZh: 电脑页面显示二维码供手机扫描，连接状态提示，断线自动重连，麦克风权限错误处理，开始/停止控制

features.name: Latency tuning + quality controls
features.nameZh: 延迟调优 + 质量控制
features.description: Tweak MediaRecorder timeslice, FFmpeg buffer params, Opus bitrate. Add basic quality selector (voice/music). Measure and document end-to-end latency.
features.descriptionZh: 调整 MediaRecorder 切片时间、FFmpeg 缓冲参数、Opus 比特率。添加音质选择器，测量端到端延迟

features.name: WebRTC P2P transport (optional)
features.description: Replace MediaRecorder + WS with RTCPeerConnection for lower latency. Phone sends MediaStreamTrack directly. Server uses werift (TS WebRTC) to receive. Keep WS for signaling only.
features.descriptionZh: 将 MediaRecorder + WebSocket 替换为 RTCPeerConnection 以降低延迟。手机直接发送 MediaStreamTrack，服务端通过 werift 接收，WebSocket 仅用于信令
